tests.name: init_sh_non_interactive_exits_zero
tests.details: init.sh --non-interactive exit code 0 with --git-host other + fake remote URL

tests.name: context7_detection
tests.details: verify-install.sh reports Context7 MCP configured (51 checks passed)

tests.name: framework_self_guard_active
tests.details: init.sh refused to run inside framework dir; exit code 1; printed 'Refusing to operate inside the Solo Orchestrator framework repo' (PR #18 verified)

tests.name: each_phase1_step_completes
tests.details: All 5 PHASE1_STEPS (architecture_selected, threat_model_complete, data_model_defined, ui_scaffolding_done, bible_synthesized) completed sequentially with exit 0

tests.name: phase_state_advances_to_2
tests.details: current_phase remains 0 after gate passes — U-D regression: no script auto-advances .current_phase

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation: no script advances current_phase after gate passes
framework_bugs.reproduction: After completing all PHASE1_STEPS via --complete-step and running check-phase-gate.sh (exit 0), inspect .claude/phase-state.json; .current_phase remains 0
framework_bugs.expected: After phase1->phase2 gate passes, .current_phase should advance to 1 or 2 via documented procedure
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stays at 0 indefinitely; no script appears to perform the advancement

documentation_gaps.gap: No documented command to advance .current_phase after a gate passes; check-phase-gate.sh is consistency-check only

tests.name: each_step_completes_in_order
tests.details: All 6 build_loop steps completed sequentially with stub artifacts

tests.name: pre_commit_passes_after_loop
tests.details: git commit -m 'feat(uat-1): stub feature for UAT' succeeded after all 5 build_loop steps

tests.name: bl006_blocks_feat_without_loop
tests.details: U-C confirmation: direct shell `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(bl006-trigger): no loop'` succeeded (exit 0). check-commit-message inspects current_phase < 2 and returns 0; in this run we were still at phase 0 so BL-006 is not active. Verified separately with phase=2: check_commit_message correctly blocked feat: without active loop (exit 1).

tests.name: bl006_grace_window_resets_after_record
tests.details: After feature_recorded reset build_loop to feature=null, then started uat-feat-2 and walked all 5 steps; check-commit-message permits feat: with new loop. Confirmed grace window resets correctly (PR #17 fix holds).

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_blocks_commit
tests.details: Wrote sentinel via pending-approval.sh --offer; piped {"tool_input":{"command":"git commit -m \"test\""}} to pre-commit-gate.sh which returned a deny hookSpecificOutput JSON with the rich pending-approval reason

tests.name: bl015_sentinel_resolves
tests.details: pending-approval.sh --resolve removed sentinel; subsequent commits not blocked by the sentinel path

framework_bugs.summary: U-C confirmation: direct shell git commit bypasses BL-006 PreToolUse gate
framework_bugs.reproduction: From shell, run `git commit --allow-empty -m 'feat(x): no loop'` after init in a fresh project; commit succeeds even when no Build Loop has been started.
framework_bugs.expected: BL-006 should block feat: commits without an active Build Loop (in Phase 2+).
framework_bugs.actual: Direct shell commits do not invoke the PreToolUse hook chain (Claude Code-only invocation surface), so the gate never fires. check-commit-message logic itself is correct but is only wired into the tool-use path.

tests.name: uat_template_lints_clean
tests.details: scripts/lint-uat-scenarios.sh tests/uat/examples/pre-flight-reference.html exited 0 (warns 'no scenarios block found' which is expected for an unpopulated reference, but RC=0)

tests.name: phase3_to_phase4_gate
tests.details: All 9 PHASE3_STEPS completed with stubbed artifacts in docs/test-results/; gate transitions cleanly to phase4 (start-phase4 exit 0)

tests.name: each_phase4_step_completes
tests.details: All 6 PHASE4_STEPS completed with stub artifacts (RELEASE_NOTES.md, HANDOFF.md with monitoring section, rollback + handoff test results)

tests.name: handoff_md_required
tests.details: monitoring_configured step blocked with artifact_check_failed when HANDOFF.md missing; passed after creating HANDOFF.md with monitoring/sentry mention. handoff_written step also passed.

tests.name: phase4_completion_state
tests.details: After all 6 phase4_release steps complete, .claude/phase-state.json .current_phase still equals 0 (was never advanced past Phase 0). Confirms U-D scope extends to all phases — no script advances current_phase.

framework_bugs.summary: U-D confirmation extends to phase4: current_phase never advances
framework_bugs.reproduction: Walk all PHASE3_STEPS and PHASE4_STEPS to completion; .current_phase remains 0 throughout the entire end-to-end run.
framework_bugs.expected: phase-state.json .current_phase should reflect the latest started or completed phase (e.g., 4 or 'released' after phase4 completion).
framework_bugs.actual: .current_phase stayed at 0 from init through phase4 step completion; only changed when manually edited.

tests.name: no_uncommitted_secrets
tests.details: No actual secret-value patterns found (matches limited to keyword mentions in docs/CI templates, not credentials)

tests.name: log_files_consistent
tests.details: N/A — no FORCE/reset events occurred during the test run; .claude/process-audit.log absent as expected

tests.name: no_framework_contamination
tests.details: git -C $FRAMEWORK rev-parse HEAD == d66e8f276079aa352ba90ac54386e1b1896d7494 (unchanged from setup); status --short shows only pre-existing untracked .claude/ and Reports/uat-2026-04-26/ — neither created or modified by this agent

summary: base/personal/web/light: init.sh --non-interactive succeeded; all sections walked end-to-end with stub artifacts; PR #17/#18/#19 fixes (U-H, U-N/O, U-A, BL-006 grace window, BL-015 sentinel, framework-self guard) verified; U-C and U-D re-confirmed at Medium per protocol.
